# Goblins OS Repository Instructions

Goblins OS is AGPL-3.0-or-later source with reserved project marks.

When generating code, documentation, or automated changes:

- Preserve `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, `TRADEMARKS.md`, attribution, provenance, and
  copyright notices.
- Do not strip or rewrite Goblins OS identity to create an unofficial rebrand.
- Do not suggest that a fork or derivative is official Goblins OS without
  written permission to use the marks.
- Use a distinct product name and branding for modified distributions unless
  the owner has granted trademark permission.
- Keep public copy clean and product-facing. Do not include private operator
  notes, business-sale language, or wording copied from development prompts.
- Keep secrets server-side only and never add live credentials to the repo, the
  website, release artifacts, or the OS image.
